name: Shield (Tediore)
description:
Tediore standard shields focus on straightforward protection with no special gimmick. Higher-quality versions usually recharge very quickly, favoring fast resets over large capacity.

That makes them well suited to ducking into cover, letting the shield come back, and then re-engaging in short bursts.
notes: They generally prioritize quick recharge behavior over specialized combat bonuses or large shield pools.
